summary: Customers 360 CRM Upgrade testing completed. All 22 backend tests pass. All frontend UI features verified working correctly. New features: /stats endpoint with computed status (Active 30d/At Risk 31-90d/Inactive 90d+), 6 stat cards at top, clickable stat cards filter table, wide profile drawer (max-w-2xl) with 5 tabs (Overview, Quotes, Invoices, Orders, Notes), 6 KPI cards in drawer, Profile and Sales Ownership sections.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customers 360 CRM upgrade complete. /admin/customers shows 6 stat cards (Total, Active, At Risk, Inactive, Unpaid Invoices, Active Orders). Clicking stat cards filters the table. Customer rows open wide drawer with 5 tabs. Backend uses /api/admin/customers-360 prefix with /stats, /list, /{customer_id} endpoints. Computed status: Active (30d), At Risk (31-90d), Inactive (90d+).

GET /api/admin/customers-360/stats.details: Returns total, active, at_risk, inactive, with_unpaid_invoices, with_active_orders. Values: {total:12, active:2, at_risk:0, inactive:10, with_unpaid_invoices:2, with_active_orders:2}

GET /api/admin/customers-360/list.details: Returns customer list with computed status field. Supports search and status filters (active/at_risk/inactive).

GET /api/admin/customers-360/{customer_i.details: Returns full 360 with summary including active_quotes, active_orders, and all recent transactions

6_stat_cards_at_top.details: Shows Total, Active, At Risk, Inactive, Unpaid Invoices, Active Orders stat cards

clickable_stat_cards_filter.details: Clicking Active card sets status filter to 'active', clicking Total resets filter

customer_table_with_status_badge.details: Table shows all columns including computed Status badge (Active/At Risk/Inactive)

wide_drawer_with_tabs.details: Clicking customer row opens wide drawer (max-w-2xl) with 5 tabs: Overview, Quotes, Invoices, Orders, Notes

overview_tab_kpi_cards.details: Overview tab shows 6 KPI cards (Total Quotes, Active Quotes, Total Invoices, Unpaid, Total Orders, Active Orders)

overview_tab_profile_section.details: Profile section shows Customer Name, Company, Type, Email, Phone, Address, Joined, Referral Code, Points, Credit Balance

overview_tab_sales_ownership.details: Sales Ownership section shows Assigned Sales, Sales Phone, Sales Email, Last Activity, Referrals

quotes_tab.details: Shows recent quotes table with date, number, amount, status

invoices_tab.details: Shows recent invoices table with date, number, amount, payment status

orders_tab.details: Shows recent orders table with date, number, amount, fulfillment status

StatusBadge_at_risk.details: StatusBadge correctly renders at_risk status as 'At Risk' with amber colors
